crossRefs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box

blocks.text: 1. Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box

refs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box

blocks.text: 2. Check inputs and replace fuse box if all is normal and system is faulty

refs.label: Check inputs and replace fuse box if all is normal and system is faulty

items.text: Before inspection, check for blown relay box No. A20 (10A), No. A21 (20A) and fuse box No. C13 (7.5A), No. C5 (7.5A) fuses and their connections.
If there is no DTC display and there is a problem with the rear wiper operation, first Inspect rear wiper motor. and inspect the grounding circuit.
Each coupler is all female-terminated on the cord side.

rows.text: Inspection items in case of abnormality
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition

Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.

Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G101) Shift position sensor Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G201) Blown No. A21 (20A) fuse in relay box Front wiper motor relay Front wiper intermittent relay Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G201) Blown No. A21 (20A) fuse in relay box Front wiper motor relay Front wiper HI/LO relay Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
0V to approx. 12V cycling between the inspection terminal and body ground during motor rotation.
Grounding failure (G201) Front wiper motor failure Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
0V to approx. 12V cycling between the inspection terminal and body ground during motor rotation.
Grounding failure (G503) Rear wiper motor failure Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Defective brake switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G503) Fuse box defective Blown No. C5 (10A) fuse in fuse box
Turn wiper switch to INT or LO position
There should be continuity between the inspection terminals.
Wiper/washer switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Turn wiper switch to LO or HI position
There should be continuity between the inspection terminals.
Wiper/washer switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
There should be continuity between the inspection terminals.
Wiper/washer switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
There should be continuity between the inspection terminals.
Wiper/washer switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Turn ignition to ON mode and short between A10 and B5 terminals
